title: Project map
summary: The deck explains the authoring problem, storage model, live editor, material workflow, generation, planning, validation, and archive handoff.
note: The browser feels direct, but the server keeps writes, rendering, and validation inside clear boundaries.

cards.title: Model
cards.body: Presentations, deck context, slide specs, and materials.

cards.title: Workflow
cards.body: Edit live, generate candidates, compare, apply, and plan.

cards.title: Handoff
cards.body: Validate rendered output, refresh baselines, and archive the deck.
